name: FR 5 — Delete User Account (Soft Deactivate) — 50 Concurrent Deactivations
description: Execute PATCH /api/v1/users/{user_id} to soft-delete users by updating status to deactivated under 50 concurrent users, validating max response time, success rate, and data integrity (deactivated users not present in /users/active).
corresponding NFR: With 50 concurrent deactivations, Max Response Time ≤ 500 ms, Success Rate ≥ 98%, and Data Integrity: deactivated users must not appear in /users/active.
preconditions: Test users must exist and be in "active" status.
Users should not have pending transactions that prevent deletion.

metrics.target: Deactivated users must not appear in /users/active

notes: Defaults used because INPUT did not specify them: duration_s=300 and think time_s=[1,3]. Data integrity check validates that deactivated user IDs do not appear in /users/active as required by NFR.
